modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to update video or fix typo on USD website

full_description_text:  
The user is calling about the USD website. They want to add or change a video on the website. Also, there is a typo on the website that needs fixing. The user is not very fluent in English, so they are having some difficulty explaining the issue clearly.
short_description: Request to update video or fix typo on USD website
description: The user is calling about the USD website. They want to add or change a video on the website. Also, there is a typo on the website that needs fixing. The user is not very fluent in English, so they are having some difficulty explaining the issue clearly.
